title: getEntity()
text: getEntity() Get the named entity in the specified occurrence or component instance, or the main instance. Object . getEntity ( EntityName ) Arguments EntityName Qualified name of the required entity Return Value Returns a uniface.Entity object representing the named entity, or null if there is no such entity contained by the current object. Exceptions The following exceptions may be thrown: uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Description The returned uniface.Entity object provides access to selected entity properties via the functions it provides. Example: JavaScript Data Addressing API Explain this code var vInstance = uniface.getInstance("MUSICLIST"); if (vInstance != null) { var vEntity = vInstance.getEntity("ITEMS.MUSICSHOP"); if (vEntity != null) { var vOccs = vEntity.getOccurrences(); for (var i = 0; i < vOccs.length; i++) { doSomethingWithOccurrence(vOccs[i]); } var vOcc = vEntity.getOccurrence(4); if (vOcc) { alert (vOcc + " has status " + vOcc.getStatus()); } } } Copy Related Links uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Exception thrown if the object on which the function is called is no longer valid. uniface The uniface object enables you to obtain information about DSP instances. uniface.Instance The uniface.Instance object provides access to selected properties and methods of the component instance that it represents. uniface.Occurrence The uniface.Occurrence object provides access to selected properties of the occurrence that it represents. It is returned by the getOccurrence function of the uniface.Entity object. uniface.Entity The uniface.Entity object provides access to selected properties of the component entity that it represents. It is returned by the getEntities and getEntity functions of the uniface.Instance and uniface.Occurrence objects. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
